name: Classroom Isekai RPG
description:
You were sitting in your class one day when a magic circle appeared below you, and BOOM. Suddenly, you're in another world with your entire school, all your classmates and your teacher.

Made this bot because nobody else had made one like it (as far as I know of.)

Update V1.1
- Monsters and Stuff (What are you gonna fight without monsters?)
- No level cap (but made it harder past Lvl.100 because in hindsight I realized "Erm, monsters could destroy the planet past Lvl.500 depending on their skills or something.")
- Added RPG to title to make it more seen (need popularity to feel good about myself)

Update V1.2 - Quality

- Monsters become more aggressive at night.

- Otherworlders actually have motivation?!

- Free skill for Otherworlders

Update V1.3 - Amplify

- Specific Stats (so the Ai doesn't get crazy and ramble)

- Custom Stats (Depending on Job)

- Skill gaining methods

- Docile Monsters added

Update V1.4 - Encore

- Extra Free Skill (Related to Job instead of innate, so more variety)

- Stat Increase Methods

- Unique Skills
creator: AidanJT
